figures.caption: Fig. 1: Per-patch channel-query cross-attention scores overlaid on raw signals. Each query specializes to a distinct modality: Query 3 activates on ECG QRS complexes, Query 1 on PPG waveforms, and Query 2 on EEG.
TABLE I: Summary of pretraining and downstream datasets. Ch: number of channels. FS: sampling frequency. T: window length.
